channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lakers rookie Dalton Knecht hits 9 3-pointers in another outstanding perimeter performance
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Dalton Knecht could only shrug when he buried his fourth consecutive 3-pointer and sent the Los Angeles Lakers ' entire arena into a frenzy.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NorCal girls volleyball roundup: Foothill, Archbishop Mitty, San Ramon Valley, Monta Vista advance to state title matches
item.description: NorCal girls volleyball roundup: Archbishop Mitty, Foothill, San Ramon Valley, Monta Vista advance to state title matches
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Celtics hand Cavaliers first loss of season, winning 120-117 to end Cleveland's 15-game win streak
item.description: The defending NBA champions held off the league’s hottest team, with Jayson Tatum scoring 33 points and adding 12 rebounds to lead the Boston Celtics to a 120-117 victory over Cleveland and hand the Cavaliers their first loss after 15 straight wins to open the season.
item.dc:creator: Jimmy Golen, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: It's Boise St, not BYU, with a bye in latest College Football Playoff rankings, with Oregon at No. 1
item.description: Boise State received the fourth and final bye in Tuesday night's College Football Playoff rankings, leaving BYU out of that mix and placing the Big 12 alongside the SEC on the list of power conferences with a gripe.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 76ers star Joel Embiid ripped in team meeting for being late to 'everything': report
item.description: After the Philadelphia 76ers fell to 2-11, they reportedly held a team meeting where Joel Embiid was called out for being late to "everything.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kickers are as good as ever these days, yet some of the NFL's true standouts are suddenly struggling
item.description: OWINGS MILLS, Md. (AP) — This is supposed to be a golden age for placekicking in the NFL. Try telling that to the fans in Baltimore, Philadelphia and Cincinnati right now.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-ESPN star Sage Steele sports MAGA-inspired necklace at UFC 309
item.description: Former ESPN anchor Sage Steele continued to show her support for President-elect Donald Trump this weekend, this time through her fashion choices.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gerardo 'Tata' Martino stepping down as coach of Lionel Messi's Inter Miami, AP source says
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Gerardo “Tata” Martino, who guided Inter Miami to the best regular season record in Major League Soccer history this season, is resigning as coach of the club, a person with knowledge of the decision said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bob Love, a 3-time NBA All-Star with the Chicago Bulls, has died at 81
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Former Chicago Bulls forward Bob Love, a three-time All-Star who spent 11 years in the NBA, died Monday. He was 81. The Bulls said Love died after a long battle with cancer. Love averaged 21.3 points and 6.8 rebounds during his nine seasons with the team. “With his No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SF Giants hire former GM Bobby Evans as adviser to Buster Posey: report
item.description: Evans served as the Giants' general manager from 2015-18 and is joined by another familiar face as an adviser.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Success of Derrick Henry, Saquon Barkley and other NFL running backs may change position's future
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ Derrick Henry, Saquon Barkley and Josh Jacobs are the top three leading rushers in the NFL. Every team had a chance to add them in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pulisic scores twice, US beats Jamaica 4-2 for 5-2 aggregate win in CONCACAF Nations League QF
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Mauricio Pochettino had a message for American players after a 5-2 aggregate win over Jamaica gave the three-time defending champion United States a berth in the CONCACAF Nations League semifinals. “My advice is look after yourself.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump thinks he can fix golf's mess. He starts by playing golf with PGA Tour commissioner
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump boasted during the campaign he would need about 15 minutes to get a deal done between the PGA Tour and the Saudi investors of LIV Golf. That started with four hours on the golf course with PGA Tour Commissioner Jay Monahan.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Paul-Tyson ring girl Sydney Thomas recalls 'once in a lifetime opportunity,' reveals how she got her start
item.description: Ring girl Sydney Thomas was a showstopper during the Jake Paul and Mike Tyson fight on Friday night. She opened about her newfound fame with her followers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls great Bob Love dead at 81 after battle with cancer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — An all-star for the Chicago Bulls in the 1970's, franchise great Bob Love has died at the age of 81 after a long battle with cancer, the team announced Monday. Love played from 1968 to 1976 with the Chicago Bulls and was affectionately nicknamed "Butterbean" for his kind demeanor.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: USD Men's Soccer to host UC Davis in NCAA Tournament
item.description: The Toreros are going to the big dance, though they don't necessarily like the song that's playing. The Toreros earned an automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament after they captured their third straight West Coast Conference Title on Saturday with their (1-0) win over Loyola Marymount.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Andrei Vasilevskiy makes 29 saves for 36th NHL shutout, Lightning beat Devils 4-0
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 29 saves for his 36th career shutout to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the New Jersey Devils 4-0 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Roy High to play for first state title since 1981
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Roy High football team will play for its first state championship in 43 years. Roy defeated defending 5A champion Timpview on Friday, 29-19 to advance to next week's title game at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
